# Component catalog

Use this catalog to select an existing component before writing a custom one. Read only the detailed component reference relevant to the current task. Registry names use the `@stacktrace/<kebab-case-name>` namespace.

| Component | Use it for | Detailed guidance |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Accordion | A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that reveal sections of content. | [Read](accordion.md) |
| Alert | Displays an important status or message that needs the user's attention. | [Read](alert.md) |
| Alert Dialog | A modal dialog that interrupts the user with important content and expects a response. | [Read](alert-dialog.md) |
| Aspect Ratio | Keeps media and other content at a predictable width-to-height ratio. | [Read](aspect-ratio.md) |
| Avatar | Displays a person or entity image with a reliable fallback. | [Read](avatar.md) |
| Badge | Displays a compact label for status, category, or metadata. | [Read](badge.md) |
| Breadcrumb | Displays the current page's location within a hierarchy of links. | [Read](breadcrumb.md) |
| Button | Displays a button or an element styled like one. | [Read](button.md) |
| Button Group | Groups related buttons together with consistent borders and spacing. | [Read](button-group.md) |
| Calendar | Lets users choose one or more dates from an inline calendar grid. | [Read](calendar.md) |
| Card | Groups related content and actions on a distinct surface. | [Read](card.md) |
| Carousel | Displays a sequence of slides with touch, pointer, and keyboard navigation. | [Read](carousel.md) |
| Chart | Composes Unovis charts with StackTrace colors, tooltips, and legends. | [Read](chart.md) |
| Checkbox | Lets a user turn an independent option on or off. | [Read](checkbox.md) |
| Collapsible | An interactive component that expands and collapses a panel. | [Read](collapsible.md) |
| Combobox | A searchable listbox for finding and selecting from a long set of options. | [Read](combobox.md) |
| Command | A searchable command list for quickly finding and running actions. | [Read](command.md) |
| Confirmation Dialog | Requests a confirmation or acknowledgement through a shared application dialog. | [Read](confirmation-dialog.md) |
| Context Menu | Displays actions and choices for a specific region when its context menu is opened. | [Read](context-menu.md) |
| Data Table | A backend-driven table with columns, actions, filters, search, sorting, and pagination. | Backend/PHP guidance deferred |
| Date Input | Combines editable date segments with a calendar popover. | [Read](date-input.md) |
| Date Picker | Opens a calendar from a compact trigger and returns an ISO date string. | [Read](date-picker.md) |
| Date Range Picker | Selects an inclusive start and end date from a two-month popover. | [Read](date-range-picker.md) |
| Date Time Input | Edits a date and optional time as keyboard-friendly segments. | [Read](date-time-input.md) |
| Dialog | A modal window layered over the page for focused content and actions. | [Read](dialog.md) |
| Drawer | A touch-friendly panel that slides from an edge of the viewport. | [Read](drawer.md) |
| Dropdown Menu | Displays a compact list of actions or choices from a visible trigger. | [Read](dropdown-menu.md) |
| Empty | Explains an empty result or first-use state and offers a sensible next step. | [Read](empty.md) |
| Field | Combines labels, controls, descriptions, and errors into consistent form fields. | [Read](field.md) |
| Filter | Provides compact frontend controls for narrowing a collection or search result. | [Read](filter.md) |
| Form | Baked controls for building consistent application forms with less repetitive composition. | [Read](form.md) |
| Hover Card | Shows a supplementary preview for the content behind a link or trigger. | [Read](hover-card.md) |
| Input | A styled native input for short text and browser-supported input types. | [Read](input.md) |
| Input Group | Places icons, text, and compact actions inside an input or textarea boundary. | [Read](input-group.md) |
| Input OTP | Collects a one-time code with keyboard, paste, and autofill support. | [Read](input-otp.md) |
| Item | Composes compact rows or cards from media, content, metadata, and actions. | [Read](item.md) |
| Kbd | Displays keyboard keys and shortcut sequences in instructional text. | [Read](kbd.md) |
| Label | Renders an accessible label associated with a form control. | [Read](label.md) |
| Logo | Renders the StackTrace mark as a small, current-color SVG. | [Read](logo.md) |
| Marker | Displays an inline status, system note, bordered row, or labeled separator in a conversation. | [Read](marker.md) |
| Menubar | Presents persistent, keyboard-accessible menus for application commands. | [Read](menubar.md) |
| Native Select | A styled native select that preserves browser and platform selection behavior. | [Read](native-select.md) |
| Navigation Menu | Organizes important site destinations into links and expandable navigation panels. | [Read](navigation-menu.md) |
| Number Field | Edits a number with localized formatting and increment and decrement controls. | [Read](number-field.md) |
| Pagination | Splits a large collection into pages with numbered and directional controls. | [Read](pagination.md) |
| Panel | Presents read-only name-value details in responsive sections. | [Read](panel.md) |
| Pin Input | Collects a short sequence through individually editable input segments. | [Read](pin-input.md) |
| Popover | Displays rich content in a positioned portal, opened by a control. | [Read](popover.md) |
| Progress | Shows measurable completion for a task or process. | [Read](progress.md) |
| Radio Group | Shows a set of mutually exclusive choices where one value can be selected. | [Read](radio-group.md) |
| Range Calendar | Lets users choose an inclusive start and end date from a visible calendar grid. | [Read](range-calendar.md) |
| Resizable | Builds adjustable horizontal or vertical application layouts with keyboard support. | [Read](resizable.md) |
| Scroll Area | Keeps native scrolling behavior while applying consistent scrollbar styling. | [Read](scroll-area.md) |
| Select | Opens a custom list of options from a trigger and returns the selected value. | [Read](select.md) |
| Separator | Adds a visual or semantic boundary between related content. | [Read](separator.md) |
| Sheet | Displays complementary content in a modal panel from an edge of the screen. | [Read](sheet.md) |
| Sidebar | Builds responsive application navigation from composable layout and menu primitives. | [Read](sidebar.md) |
| Skeleton | Reserves the shape of content while that content is loading. | [Read](skeleton.md) |
| Slider | Selects one or more numeric values by moving thumbs along a bounded track. | [Read](slider.md) |
| Sonner | Displays transient toast feedback without interrupting the current task. | [Read](sonner.md) |
| Spinner | Indicates that work is active when its completion cannot be measured. | [Read](spinner.md) |
| Stepper | Organizes a multi-step task and exposes the user's current position. | [Read](stepper.md) |
| Switch | Turns an immediate setting on or off. | [Read](switch.md) |
| Table | Presents related records in responsive, semantic rows and columns. | [Read](table.md) |
| Tabs | Switches between related content panels without leaving the current view. | [Read](tabs.md) |
| Tags Input | Collects multiple short values as keyboard-navigable, removable tags. | [Read](tags-input.md) |
| Textarea | A multiline text control for messages, notes, and longer free-form values. | [Read](textarea.md) |
| Toggle | Controls one independent two-state interface mode. | [Read](toggle.md) |
| Toggle Group | Coordinates related toggles as a single- or multiple-selection control. | [Read](toggle-group.md) |
| Tooltip | Displays brief contextual information when a control receives focus or is hovered. | [Read](tooltip.md) |

## Choosing close alternatives

- Use **Alert Dialog** for an interruptive decision and **Confirmation Dialog** for the application-wide programmatic confirmation flow.
- Use **Dialog** for focused modal work, **Sheet** for complementary edge content, and **Drawer** for a touch-oriented sliding panel.
- Use **Native Select** for native platform behavior, **Select** for a styled list, and **Combobox** when searching a larger set matters.
- Use **Table** for semantic client-rendered tables and **Data Table** when PHP owns columns, filters, actions, sorting, or pagination.
- Use **Checkbox** for independent choices, **Radio Group** for one choice among several, and **Switch** for an immediately applied setting.
- Use **Button Group** only when related buttons form one compact control; keep independent actions such as Save and Cancel separate.

Inspect the installed component source before using props or emits not covered by its reference. Data Table and its PHP API remain in the separate backend reference pass.
